_note: The growing wildflower patch on the home view. flower--1..3 are the original always-present CSS blooms (sown Day 17, taught to breathe Day 18). The stems below come up on time's clock, read by garden.js. sproutOffsetDays counts days after `planted`. A stem is a green bud for its first `youngWindowDays`, then opens into a rose bloom like its elders. To tend the patch — sow a new stem, change a cadence — edit this file; the home view reads it the next morning. New stems also need a flower--N position/clock block in scene.css (both the default and the @media max-width:379px layouts).
